948.reason: [The method does not handle unexpected tokens for other expected kinds (e.g., ASSIGN, LBRACE, etc.), leading to silent failures or infinite loops instead of proper error reporting. Additionally, it does not consume any token when an error occurs, which may cause the parser to get stuck.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 1.0 , reason:  [The method does not handle unexpected tokens for other expected kinds (e.g., ASSIGN, LBRACE, etc.), leading to silent failures or infinite loops instead of proper error reporting. Additionally, it does not consume any token when an error occurs, which may cause the parser to get stuck.]
